name: browserclaw
description: Give Claude Desktop a real browser. This extension connects Claude to BrowserClaw, the browser your AI agents drive using your logged-in accounts.
long_description: BrowserClaw is a Chromium-based browser your AI agents drive with your existing logins. This extension is a stdio MCP proxy: it discovers a running BrowserClaw claw-server on your machine and forwards every Claude Desktop tool call to its /mcp endpoint. The browser surface, session recording, and skill catalogue all live inside BrowserClaw itself.

url.title: BrowserClaw base URL (optional loopback override)
url.description: Leave blank to auto-discover on the default BrowserClaw port. Override only if you run BrowserClaw on a custom port on this machine. Must be a loopback URL on 127.0.0.1, [::1], or localhost. Example: http://127.0.0.1:9200
